title: Will the **high temp in Miami** be 77-78° on Mar 19, 2026?
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded at Miami International Airport for March 19, 2026 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is between 77-78°, then the market resolves to Yes.
